title: Support Worker
description:
Contract: 35 hours per week per annum (average), including sleep-ins.
You will be supporting vulnerable young people in a residential setting, helping them develop independence and life skills. The role involves providing emotional support, maintaining a safe environment, and working as part of a care team to deliver high-quality outcomes.
Responsibilities include safeguarding, supporting daily routines, encouraging engagement in education and activities, and maintaining accurate records.
This is a full-time role based in Leeds with structured shifts.
summary: 35-hour support worker role in Leeds within a residential setting supporting young people; £28,000 per year.

title: Support Worker
description:
Are you looking for a flexible role where you can make a real difference?
This support worker role in Leeds offers flexible shifts across a range of care settings. You will support individuals with daily living activities, personal care, and emotional support.
You will promote independence, dignity, and wellbeing while working as part of a wider care team. Shifts may include evenings, weekends, and ad-hoc cover depending on service needs.
Previous care experience and strong communication skills are desirable.
summary: Flexible Leeds support worker role across care settings; £14.82 per hour.

title: Residential Childcare Support Worker
description:
Residential Childcare Support Worker (Part Time).
You will support children and young people in a residential care setting in Leeds, helping to create a safe, nurturing, and structured environment.
Duties include supporting daily routines, emotional wellbeing, education engagement, and positive behaviour.
You will work as part of a team to implement care plans and ensure safeguarding standards are maintained.
summary: Part-time residential childcare role in Leeds supporting young people; £13.31 per hour.

title: Support Worker
company: Creative Support Ltd • Company • Not Specified
description:
Creative Support is looking for a warm, reliable and proactive Support Worker to join the team in Leeds.
You will provide person-centred care and support to individuals with a range of needs, assisting with daily living tasks, personal care, and community engagement.
You will build positive relationships, encourage independence, and work alongside colleagues and professionals to deliver high-quality support.
Training and development opportunities are available.
summary: Leeds support worker role with Creative Support providing person-centred care; £12.60 per hour.

title: Support Worker
company: Creative Support Ltd • Company • Not Specified
description:
Support Worker role in a rural Leeds service.
You will support individuals with a range of needs, providing practical and emotional support and assisting with daily living activities.
The role involves promoting independence, encouraging participation in community activities, and maintaining a safe and supportive environment.
Experience in care is beneficial, and full training is provided.
summary: Support worker role in rural Leeds supporting varied care needs; £12.60 per hour.

title: Complex Care Assistant
description:
Female Complex Care Assistant
Pudsey
£15.00 per hour (including holiday pay)
Permanent contract available after successful probation.
Applicants must have the right to work in the UK (no sponsorship available).
Must be a driver with access to your own car.
This role is open to female applicants only under the Equality Act 2010 due to specific client care needs.
summary: Complex care assistant role in Pudsey at £15.00 per hour including holiday pay. Driver required; permanent contract available after probation.

title: Relief Support Worker
description:
We are seeking warm, motivated, and person-centred Relief Support Workers to join our team in Wakefield. You will be providing personalised care and support to adults with learning disabilities, each with unique support needs. This role requires promoting active and independent lifestyles in line with the principles of Creative Support.
In this role, you will offer respectful personal care, practical and emotional support to service users at our Wakefield services. You will help maximise social opportunities and community engagement, foster warm and trusting relationships with service users, and work collaboratively with colleagues, families, and other professionals to provide a coordinated and consistent service. Additionally, you can choose to be paid on a weekly or monthly basis.
Twelve months minimum experience in a care role is essential. Candidates must have excellent verbal and written communication skills and the ability to provide respectful personal care.
summary: Relief support worker role in Wakefield supporting adults with learning disabilities; £12.85 per hour.

title: Support Worker
description:
Do you have a caring nature? Are you looking to make a difference to people's lives? Do you want to work in an environment where no two days are the same? Are you flexible with your working hours?
Turning Point provides services across Bradford supporting people with learning disabilities, autism, behaviours of distress and complex needs.
As a Support Worker, you will support individuals to achieve their goals, develop independence, and live fulfilling lives.
Every day is different, and the role is varied and rewarding.
summary: Permanent support worker role in Bradford with Turning Point; £24,773 per year.

title: Support Worker Driver
description:
Creative Support are looking for Support Workers in Bradford to support individuals with mental health needs.
You will build relationships, encourage independence, and support recovery-focused goals.
Duties include providing emotional support, assisting with daily living tasks, and working collaboratively with professionals and families.
Training and development pathways are available.
summary: Bradford support worker driver role supporting mental health needs; £12.85 per hour.

title: Crisis Support Worker
description:
Crisis Support Worker role in Bradford supporting adults with mental health needs.
You will provide person-centred, recovery-focused support and help develop care plans.
Responsibilities include risk management, practical support, and working with partner organisations.
You will support individuals to move on from services and access appropriate support.
summary: Crisis support worker role in Bradford supporting mental health needs; £12.85 per hour.

summary: Complex care assistant role in Huddersfield at £15.00 per hour including holiday pay.

title: Healthcare Assistant
company: PRECEDO HEALTHCARE SERVICES LIMITED • Agency • Contract
description:
Healthcare Assistant - One to One Care
Precedo Healthcare are seeking experienced Healthcare Assistants to deliver one-to-one care in and around Huddersfield.
Duties include personal care, supporting activities, monitoring, updating care plans, liaising with professionals, and administering medication.
Candidates must have at least 6 months experience and strong communication skills.
summary: One-to-one healthcare assistant role in Huddersfield; £13.00–£14.50 per hour.
